_note: Buttons template: an image with a title, body text, and up to 4 action buttons. 'altText' is required (max 400 chars) for unsupported clients. 'text' max: 160 chars normally, 60 chars when thumbnailImageUrl is set. 'title' max: 40 chars. The 'defaultAction' fires when the image area is tapped. Template messages do NOT render on LINE for PC or some older clients — always set a meaningful altText. Templates are considered legacy; Flex messages offer more flexibility.

messages.altText: Product menu — tap to view options
